description: A ground-level photograph of an agricultural landscape, likely in a Mediterranean region, featuring rows of young to mature olive trees planted in reddish-brown tilled soil in the foreground and midground. In the middle distance, behind the olive trees, are fields showing other agricultural uses, including green crops planted in distinct rows, possibly vineyards or other permanent crops, and a large area of yellow-brown land, suggesting annual crops or fallow fields. The background shows gently rolling hills under an overcast sky. A small watermark "www.PhotoLibre.com 2008" is visible in the bottom left corner. This image visually represents land use categories such as "Olive groves" (CORINE Land Cover, CLC class 2.2.2.0), "Vineyards, fruit trees and berry plantations" (CLC class 2.2.1.0), or "Annual Crops Associated with Permanent Crops" (CLC class 2.3.1.0).
